description: A customer needs a new auto insurance ID card because they lost their old one.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the customer's account.

nodes.task_description: Generate a new digital ID card.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully generates a PDF of the new ID card.

nodes.task_description: Send the digital ID card to the customer's registered email address.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully emails the document to the customer.
